2026-02-27T01:43:20.8263383Z ##[group]Run set -eo pipefail
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8263795Z [36;1mset -eo pipefail[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8264040Z [36;1mmkdir -p /tmp/gh-aw/mcp-config[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8264283Z [36;1m[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8264589Z [36;1m# Export gateway environment variables for MCP config and gateway script[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8264979Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_PORT="80"[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8265273Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_DOMAIN="host.docker.internal"[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8265650Z [36;1mMCP_GATEWAY_API_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8266007Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${MCP_GATEWAY_API_KEY}"[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8266288Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_API_KEY[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8266733Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_PAYLOAD_DIR="/tmp/gh-aw/mcp-payloads"[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8267094Z [36;1mmkdir -p "${MCP_GATEWAY_PAYLOAD_DIR}"[0m
2026-02-27T01:43:20.8267369Z [36;1mexport DEBUG="*"[0m
